videos.headline: Max Brosmer finds Daniel Jackson for a Minnesota TD
videos.description: Max Brosmer zips a pass to Daniel Jackson near the pylon to give Minnesota a 14-0 lead over Wisconsin.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Max Brosmer finds Daniel Jackson for a Minnesota TD) 2024/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Vinny Anthony scores Wisconsin's first points on 15-yard TD catch
videos.description: Braedyn Locke finds Vinny Anthony in the end zone to cut the deficit for Wisconsin.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vinny Anthony scores Wisconsin's first points on 15-yard TD catch) 2024/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jameson Geers makes a nice TD catch to boost Minnesota's lead
videos.description: Jameson Geers hauls in the touchdown catch to give Minnesota a 21-0 lead over Wisconsin.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jameson Geers makes a nice TD catch to boost Minnesota's lead) 2024/11/29 ESHEET
